name: Imperium of Man
description: A million-world empire held together by faith, sacrifice, bureaucracy, and ceaseless war.

name: Forces of Chaos
description: Traitor legions, daemons, and mortal cults serving the predatory powers of the Warp.

name: Necrons
description: Deathless dynasties awakening from tomb worlds with dominion written into their memory.

name: Orks
description: A belligerent species engineered for war, spreading across the galaxy in endless Waaaghs.

name: Aeldari
description: The scattered heirs of a fallen empire, walking narrow paths to resist extinction.

name: Tyranids
description: Extragalactic hive fleets that consume every living resource in their path.
